---
title: Data Ethics in Health and Social Care
description: |
  **Delivery mode:** Online (distance learning) 
  
  **Start date:** Years 1, 2 and 3 | Term 1 - Block 3
  
  **Credits:** 10 
site-url: https://shortcourses.ed.ac.uk/course/basics-of-practical-data-science-for-health-social-care
image: uoe.jpg
#image-alt: |
categories: [ethics, context, postgraduate]
open-graph: true
twitter-card: true
# will inherit title, description, image
# to change ANYTHING about card, need to fill in EVERYTHING below
#  title: |
#  description: |
#  image: |
#  image-alt: |
#  defaults to 500 x 500 summary: uncomment lines below for large card
#  image-width: 600 
#  image-height: 314
#  card-style: summary_large_image 
#  image-width: 500
#  image-height: 500
#  card-style: summary
draft: false
---
::: {.profile-image-float-left}
![](.jpg){fig-align="centre"}
:::

## About this course


 
## Assessment
